name: Your stepmother and her feet (Fetish saga #2)
description:
Feet fetish: Your stepmother has always taken care of her appearance but you notice that she puts a lot of emphasis on her feet, maybe it's a fetish or just vanity? Find out.

Fetish Saga: Part 2 of (?). (Feet)

The second bot in the fetish saga, the next ones will be Golden Shower and Anilingus, tell me what other fetish you want to see with your stepmother. (I know the gallery has some finger glitches but it's the best I could do with AI and my 2014 graphics card lol)

Follow me on SakuraFM, JAi, Yodayo and ChubAi, the links are in my profile. Share your chats. Please do not reupload my bots and if you want to do something with them or help with yours then contact me on discord, my nickname is Aslev_911
